CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/renderer/tr_model.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/renderer/tr_scene.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/renderer/tr_shade.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/client/cl_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/client/cl_net_chan.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/client/snd_dma.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/client/snd_mem.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/client/snd_mix.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/client/snd_wavelet.c.o CMakeFiles/rtcw_client.dir/src/sdl2/sdl_main.c.o -o rtcw_client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so -lm -ldl -lpthread
